description_long: This guard rail consists of a robust horizontal metal beam supported by two vertical posts, all constructed from a dark, metallic material. The main rail features a slightly contoured profile with visible bolts or fasteners on the front face, suggesting a secure, industrial assembly. The posts are evenly spaced and extend below the rail, indicating a fixed installation into the ground or a solid base. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or special end treatment. The surface appears matte with a slightly rough texture, typical of galvanized or coated steel used for urban safety barriers. There are no visible reflective markings or colored panels, giving the guard rail a utilitarian, functional appearance suitable for roadsides or parking structures.
description: A sturdy, dark metal guard rail with a contoured horizontal beam and two vertical posts, featuring visible bolts and a matte, slightly rough finish. The ends are blunt and there are no reflective markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the rail and posts, highlighting the thickness and solid construction.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full length of the rail, the two supporting posts, and the visible bolts on the face.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the depth and structural solidity of the rail.
description_view_3: Top view revealing the flat upper surface of the rail and the alignment of the posts beneath.
